snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)
client.v2.test()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.v2.test()


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
from seed import (
    ActualResultZero,
    SeedApi,
    StackInformation,
    TestCaseResult,
    TestCaseResultWithStdout,
    TraceResponse,
    VariableValueZero,
)

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)
client.admin.storetracedtestcase(
    submission_id="submissionId",
    test_case_id="testCaseId",
    result=TestCaseResultWithStdout(
        result=TestCaseResult(
            expected_result=VariableValueZero(
                type="integerValue",
            ),
            actual_result=ActualResultZero(
                type="value",
            ),
            passed=True,
        ),
        stdout="stdout",
    ),
    trace_responses=[
        TraceResponse(
            submission_id="submissionId",
            line_number=1,
            stack=StackInformation(
                num_stack_frames=1,
            ),
        )
    ],
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import (
    ActualResultZero,
    AsyncSeedApi,
    StackInformation,
    TestCaseResult,
    TestCaseResultWithStdout,
    TraceResponse,
    VariableValueZero,
)

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.admin.storetracedtestcase(
        submission_id="submissionId",
        test_case_id="testCaseId",
        result=TestCaseResultWithStdout(
            result=TestCaseResult(
                expected_result=VariableValueZero(
                    type="integerValue",
                ),
                actual_result=ActualResultZero(
                    type="value",
                ),
                passed=True,
            ),
            stdout="stdout",
        ),
        trace_responses=[
            TraceResponse(
                submission_id="submissionId",
                line_number=1,
                stack=StackInformation(
                    num_stack_frames=1,
                ),
            )
        ],
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi, StackInformation, TracedFile, TraceResponseV2

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)
client.admin.storetracedtestcasev2(
    submission_id="submissionId",
    test_case_id="testCaseId",
    request=[
        TraceResponseV2(
            submission_id="submissionId",
            line_number=1,
            file=TracedFile(
                filename="filename",
                directory="directory",
            ),
            stack=StackInformation(
                num_stack_frames=1,
            ),
        )
    ],
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, StackInformation, TracedFile, TraceResponseV2

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.admin.storetracedtestcasev2(
        submission_id="submissionId",
        test_case_id="testCaseId",
        request=[
            TraceResponseV2(
                submission_id="submissionId",
                line_number=1,
                file=TracedFile(
                    filename="filename",
                    directory="directory",
                ),
                stack=StackInformation(
                    num_stack_frames=1,
                ),
            )
        ],
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import (
    AsyncSeedApi,
    StackInformation,
    TraceResponse,
    WorkspaceRunDetails,
)

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.admin.storetracedworkspace(
        submission_id="submissionId",
        workspace_run_details=WorkspaceRunDetails(
            stdout="stdout",
        ),
        trace_responses=[
            TraceResponse(
                submission_id="submissionId",
                line_number=1,
                stack=StackInformation(
                    num_stack_frames=1,
                ),
            )
        ],
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, StackInformation, TracedFile, TraceResponseV2

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.admin.storetracedworkspacev2(
        submission_id="submissionId",
        request=[
            TraceResponseV2(
                submission_id="submissionId",
                line_number=1,
                file=TracedFile(
                    filename="filename",
                    directory="directory",
                ),
                stack=StackInformation(
                    num_stack_frames=1,
                ),
            )
        ],
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, VariableTypeAndName, VariableTypeZero

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.problem.getdefaultstarterfiles(
        input_params=[
            VariableTypeAndName(
                variable_type=VariableTypeZero(
                    type="integerType",
                ),
                name="name",
            )
        ],
        output_type=VariableTypeZero(
            type="integerType",
        ),
        method_name="methodName",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
